task_objective: Fix Heroic Flatpak discovery so sideloaded games and store-cache metadata resolve to existing local install directories.
design_decisions: Keep the public InstalledGame output shape unchanged for Heroic records.
Read explicit Heroic metadata files for installed, sideload, and store-cache libraries before falling back to recursive installed.json discovery.
Resolve Heroic paths from explicit install path fields, absolute folder_name, relative folder_name under defaultSettings.defaultInstallPath, then install.executable parent.
Exclude Heroic records marked is_installed false or whose resolved local path does not exist.
results: Red test run failed on the five new Heroic discovery cases before implementation.
Green test run passed with 33 tests after implementation.
